allow: Bash(ollama.exe --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no ollama"; pip --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no pip")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.llm.chat_service import get_chat_model

async def test\(\):
    llm = get_chat_model\('groq-llama3-8b'\)
    resp = await llm.ainvoke\([{'role':'user','content':'say hi in 3 words'}]\)
    print\('SUCCESS:', resp.content\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.core.config import get_settings; s=get_settings\(\); print\('GROQ key:', repr\(s.GROQ_API_KEY[:15]+'...' if s.GROQ_API_KEY else 'EMPTY'\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import asyncio
from app.services.llm.chat_service import get_chat_model
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage

async def test\(\):
    llm = get_chat_model\('gemini-2.0-flash'\)
    resp = await llm.ainvoke\([HumanMessage\(content='say hello in 5 words'\)]\)
    print\('SUCCESS:', resp.content\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 22100 | Select-Object ProcessName, Path, CommandLine | Format-List" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" 2>&1; sleep 2; netstat -ano | grep ":8000.*LISTEN")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.Id -ne \\$PID } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" 2>&1; sleep 3; netstat -ano | grep ":8000.*LISTEN")
